steps.title: Find the lower bound
steps.content:
The side $x$ and the side of length $7$ must add to more than the side of length $12$:
$$x+7>12$$
$$x>5$$

steps.title: Find the upper bound
steps.content:
The two known sides must also add to more than the third side $x$:
$$7+12>x$$
$$19>x$$

steps.title: Combine the bounds
steps.content:
Both bounds must hold at the same time, so the possible lengths are:
$$5C.
